description: Routing policy for agent-session captures. Valid kinds carry their kind as a label (weight 3), so a plain valid capture defaults to team_candidate; review keywords force the warning path. Because the kind label sets a team-candidate baseline, ignore requires the scratch signals to outweigh it (multiple ignore keywords / a no-context label) — clear scratch work is filtered, but a single stray keyword is not enough to auto-reject. The local route is intentionally unreachable for valid kinds; the human show-before-share confirm is the final gate.

ignore.description: Scratch or throwaway session output that should not become shared context.

local.description: Defined for parity with context-policy; unreachable for valid capture kinds by design.

team_candidate.description: A valid capture, stageable for the human show-before-share confirm.

review_required.description: Sensitive or consequential content — staged with an explicit review warning.
